    have hy'x : y' ^ 2 + x ^ 2 = k * (y' * x + 1) := by nlinarith [hxy]
    have : 0 < y' := by

      by_contra!; have : x * y' + 1 ≤ 0 := by nlinarith [hx]; nlinarith [hy'x]
    lift y' to ℕ using (by linarith)
    have : y' < x := by nlinarith [hy'y, hxy_le]
    exact (hmin (by linarith) hx (by norm_cast)).not_lt this
  refine ⟨x, ?_⟩; have : x ^ 2 = k := by nlinarith [this, hxy]; rw [this, hk]; norm_cast; field_simp; ring

    have hmin : ∀ p ∈ S, A + B ≤ p.1 + p.2 := fun p hp => by dsimp [A, B]; split_ifs <;> [rw [add_comm]; skip]; exact hmin₀ p hp
    let x : ℤ := k * B - A
    have hx_prop : x ^ 2 + B ^ 2 = k * (x * B + 1) := by rw [sq, ← sub_eq_iff_eq_add.mp hAB, ← sub_eq_iff_eq_add]; ring
    have hx_nonneg : 0 ≤ x := by
      by_contra! hx; have : k * (x * B + 1) ≥ 0 := by rw [← hx_prop]; nlinarith
      have : k ≥ 1 := by nlinarith [hAB, hA, hB]
      nlinarith [hB, hx]
    obtain ⟨x, rfl⟩ : ∃ n : ℕ, (n : ℤ) = x := ⟨x.toNat, by rw [Int.toNat_of_nonneg hx_nonneg]⟩
    cases x with
    | zero => exact ⟨B, by rw [sq, ← sub_eq_iff_eq_add.mp hAB, Int.ofNat_zero] at hx_prop; nlinarith⟩
    | succ x =>
      have : (x + 1, B) ∈ S := ⟨by simp, hB, by exact_mod_cast hx_prop⟩
      have hA_lt : x + 1 < A := by
        have : (x + 1 : ℤ) * A = B ^ 2 - k := by rw [← sub_eq_iff_eq_add.mp hAB]; ring
        have : k ≥ 1 := by nlinarith [hAB, hA, hB]
        nlinarith [hBA]
      exact (hmin (x + 1, B) this).elim (by dsimp; linarith)
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := this
  use x; rw [hx, ← Nat.cast_pow]; field_simp [hk]

simp [Nat.add_comm, h])
  let A' : ℤ := k * B - A
  have hA' : A * A' = B ^ 2 - (k : ℤ) := by zify at hAB; nlinarith
  have : k = B ^ 2 := by
    by_contra hk_sq
    have hA'p : 0 < A' := by
      by_contra h'; have : (A' : ℤ) ^ 2 + (B : ℤ) ^ 2 = k * (A' * B + 1) := by zify at hAB; nlinarith
      nlinarith
    have : A' < A := by zify at hA'; nlinarith
    lift A' to ℕ using by linarith
    exact hmin (show (A', B) ∈ S from ⟨by linarith, hB, by zify; nlinarith⟩) (by linarith)
  use B; rw [this, ← Nat.cast_pow]; norm_cast; rw [h_eq]; field_simp; ring

suffices ∃ x, k = x ^ 2 by
    rcases this with ⟨x, hx⟩; use x
    have : (↑a * ↑b + 1 : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by positivity
    field_simp [this]; rw [← hx]; norm_cast; rw [hk, mul_comm]
  let S := {p : ℕ × ℕ | 0 < p.1 ∧ 0 < p.2 ∧ (p.1^2 + p.2^2 : ℤ) = k * (p.1 * p.2 + 1)}
  obtain ⟨⟨A, B⟩, ⟨hA, hB, hAB⟩, hmin⟩ := WellFounded.has_min (measure (fun p : ℕ × ℕ => p.1 + p.2)).wf S ⟨(a, b), h₀.1, h₀.2, by zify; rw [hk]; ring⟩
  have hBA : B ≤ A := by
    by_contra h; exact (hmin (B, A) ⟨hB, hA, by rw [add_comm, mul_comm]; exact hAB⟩).not_lt (by simp; linarith)
  let A' : ℤ := k * B - A
  have hA'1 : A' * A = B ^ 2 - k := by rw [Int.mul_sub, ← hAB]; ring
  have hA'2 : A' ^ 2 + B ^ 2 = k * (A' * B + 1) := by rw [show A' = k * B - A from rfl]; ring_nf; rw [hAB]; ring
  have hA'nonneg : 0 ≤ A' := by
    by_contra h; have : A' * B + 1 ≤ 0 := by nlinarith [h, hB, h_k_pos]
    nlinarith [hA'2, h_k_pos]
  rcases hA'nonneg.eq_or_gt with rfl | hA'pos
  · use B; zify at hA'1; linarith
  · have hA'lt : A' < A := by nlinarith [hA'1, h_k_pos]
    exact (hmin (A'.toNat, B) ⟨Int.toNat_pos.mpr hA'pos, hB, by zify [Int.toNat_of_nonneg hA'nonneg]; exact hA'2⟩).not_lt (by zify [Int.toNat_of_nonneg hA'nonneg]; linarith)

simp [← hx, hk]
  field_simp

let k := (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2) / (a * b + 1)
  have hk : (a : ℤ) ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = k * (a * b + 1) := by
    rw [← Nat.cast_div h₁ (by linarith)]; norm_cast
  have : ∃ x : ℕ, (x : ℤ) ^ 2 = k := by
    let S := {p : ℕ × ℕ | 0 < p.1 ∧ 0 < p.2 ∧ (p.1 : ℤ) ^ 2 + p.2 ^ 2 = k * (p.1 * p.2 + 1)}
    obtain ⟨⟨A, B⟩, ⟨hA, hB, hK⟩, hmin⟩ := WellFounded.has_min (measure (fun p : ℕ × ℕ => p.1 + p.2)).wf S ⟨a, b, h₀.1, h₀.2, hk⟩
    let (A, B, hK, hmin) := if A ≤ B then (B, A, (by rwa [add_comm, mul_comm] at hK), (by intro p hp; have := hmin p hp; rwa [add_comm B A] at this)) else (A, B, hK, hmin)
    have hA : 0 < A := by if h : A ≤ B then linarith else linarith
    have hB : 0 < B := by if h : A ≤ B then linarith else linarith
    let A' : ℤ := k * B - A
    if hA'0 : A' = 0 then use B; nlinarith
    else
      have hA'pos : 0 < A' := by
        if hA'B : A' * B + 1 ≤ 0 then
          if hA'B0 : A' * B + 1 = 0 then (by clear hK hk; nlinarith)
          else (by have : k * (A' * B + 1) ≤ 0 := mul_nonpos_of_nonneg_of_nonpos (by linarith) (by linarith); nlinarith)
        else nlinarith
      have hA'lt : A' < A := by
        if hAB_eq : A = B then
          (have : (A ^ 2 + 1 : ℤ) ∣ 2 := ⟨2 - k, by nlinarith⟩
           have : A = 1 := by clear hK hk; nlinarith
           nlinarith)
        else (by have : A * A' = (B : ℤ) ^ 2 - k := by nlinarith; nlinarith)
      exact (hmin (A'.natAbs, B) ⟨natAbs_pos.mpr hA'0, hB, by rw [Int.natAbs_of_nonneg (by linarith)]; nlinarith⟩ (by nlinarith)).elim
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := this
  use x; rw [← hx]; push_cast; rw [Nat.cast_div h₁ (by linarith)]; field_simp; linarith

simp [hxn, hx2]⟩
      have : xn < b := by zify; rw [hxn]; nlinarith [hx1]
      exact (hmin (xn, a) hS).not_lt (by simp [xn]; linarith)
  obtain ⟨x, rfl⟩ := this
  use x; rw [Nat.cast_pow, Nat.cast_div h₁ (by positivity)]; simp

simpa [add_comm] using hmin) (le_of_not_le hab)
    let x : ℤ := k * b - a
    have hx1 : (a : ℤ) * x = b ^ 2 - k := by nlinarith
    have hx2 : x ^ 2 + (b : ℤ) ^ 2 = k * (x * b + 1) := by nlinarith
    by_contra! hsq
    have x_pos : 0 < x := by
      have : x ≠ 0 := by rintro rfl; linarith [hx1, hsq b]
      if x_neg : x < 0 then
        have : x * b + 1 < 0 := by nlinarith [x_neg, hb]
        nlinarith [hx2]
      else exact lt_of_le_of_ne (by linarith) this.symm
    lift x to ℕ using (by linarith)
    have : x < a := by nlinarith [hx1, ha, hb, hk]
    linarith [hmin (show (x, b) ∈ S from ⟨by linarith, hb, by rw [← hx2]; ring⟩)]
  obtain ⟨x, rfl⟩ := this; use x; rw [Nat.cast_pow]; field_simp [show (↑a * ↑b + 1 : ℝ) ≠ 0 by positivity]; zify; exact hk₀.symm

sq_pos_of_ne_zero (b : ℤ) (by nlinarith)]
    lift a' to ℕ using ha'n
    cases' Nat.eq_zero_or_pos a' with h₀' h_pos
    · use b; nlinarith
    · exact (hmin ⟨h_pos, hb, ha'⟩ (by nlinarith)).elim
  use x; rw [← Nat.cast_pow, ← Int.cast_pow, hx, Nat.cast_div h₁ (by linarith)]; push_cast; ring
simp [← hx, Nat.cast_div h₁, h₁]
simp; rw [Nat.cast_div h₁]; field_simp; norm_cast

sq, zero_add] at hx₂_eq; exact h_sq B (by simpa using hx₂_eq)
    else
      have hxS : (x₂, B) ∈ S := ⟨Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hx0, hB, by rw [← hx₂_eq]; ring⟩
      specialize hmin (x₂, B) hxS; dsimp at hmin
      have : x₂ < A := by
        have hx₂A : (x₂ : ℤ) * A = B ^ 2 - k := by zify at hAB; rw [← hAB]; ring
        zify at hA hB hAB; have : (k : ℤ) ≥ 1 := by nlinarith
        have : (x₂ : ℤ) * A < (A : ℤ) * A := by nlinarith
        exact (mul_lt_mul_right (Int.coe_nat_pos.mpr hA)).1 this
      omega
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := this; use x; rw [hx, Nat.cast_pow, Nat.cast_div h₁ (by omega)]; simp

simp; linarith [hab, hxb]⟩
      linarith [hmin (a, x.toNat) this, Int.toNat_lt.2 hx_pos]
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := this; use x; rw [hx, Nat.cast_div h₁ (by simp; linarith)]; field_simp [hk]; ring

split_ifs <;> linarith
    have hB : 0 < B := by split_ifs <;> linarith
    have hQ : A ^ 2 + B ^ 2 = k * (A * B + 1) := by split_ifs <;> ring_nf at * <;> linarith
    have hAB : B ≤ A := by split_ifs <;> linarith
    have hmin : ∀ p ∈ S, A + B ≤ p.1 + p.2 := by intro p hp; split_ifs <;> (simp [add_comm] at *; exact hmin p hp)
    let x : ℤ := k * B - A
    have hxQ : x ^ 2 + B ^ 2 = k * (x * B + 1) := by apply_fun (fun (n:ℕ) => (n:ℤ)) at hQ; push_cast at hQ; nlinarith
    have hx_val : (A : ℤ) * x = B ^ 2 - k := by apply_fun (fun (n:ℕ) => (n:ℤ)) at hQ; push_cast at hQ; nlinarith
    if hx0 : x = 0 then use B; zify at hx_val; rw [hx0] at hx_val; linarith
    else if hx_pos : 0 < x then
      have h_x_S : (x.toNat, B) ∈ S := ⟨by linarith, hB, by zify; rwa [Int.toNat_of_nonneg (by linarith)]⟩
      have : x < A := by have : k > 0 := by rw [← hQ]; nlinarith; nlinarith [hx_val]
      exact absurd (by zify; linarith : x.toNat + B < A + B) (hmin (x.toNat, B) h_x_S)
    else
      have : k > 0 := by rw [← hQ]; nlinarith
      have : x * B + 1 ≤ 0 := by have : x ≤ -1 := by linarith; nlinarith
      nlinarith [hxQ]
  rcases this with ⟨x, hx⟩; use x; rw [← hx, Nat.cast_pow]; have : (↑a * ↑b + 1 : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by norm_cast; linarith
  field_simp; norm_cast; rw [mul_comm, ← hk]

split_ifs <;> [rwa [add_comm, mul_comm] at *; assumption]⟩
  obtain ⟨hx_pos, hy_pos, hxy_eq⟩ := hxyS
  let x' : ℤ := k * y - x
  have hx' : x' ^ 2 + (y : ℤ) ^ 2 = k * (x' * y + 1) ∧ x' * x = (y : ℤ) ^ 2 - k := by
    have : (x : ℤ) ^ 2 + (y : ℤ) ^ 2 = k * (x * y + 1) := by norm_cast
    constructor <;> linarith
  have hx'0 : x' = 0 := by
    by_contra hx'0
    have hk1 : 1 ≤ k := by have : x ^ 2 + y ^ 2 ≥ 1 * (x * y + 1) := by nlinarith; rw [hxy_eq] at this; nlinarith
    have hx'pos : x' > 0 := by by_contra'; nlinarith [hx'.1, hy_pos, hk1]
    have hp' : (x'.toNat, y) ∈ S := ⟨by linarith, hy_pos, by zify; simp [hx'.1, hx'pos]⟩
    exact WellFounded.not_lt_min (measure (fun p => p.1 + p.2)).wf S _ hp' (by linarith [x, y, p₀, hx'.2, hk1])
  use y; rw [hk, Nat.cast_pow, Nat.cast_pow, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_mul, mul_div_cancel_left]
  · have : k = y ^ 2 := by linarith [hx'.2]; rw [this]; norm_cast
  · exact Nat.cast_add_one_ne_zero _

sub_eq_zero] at *; zify at *; exact y ^ 2
    else if hx'p : 0 < x' then
      have hsum : x'.toNat + y < x + y := by
        zify; rw [Int.toNat_of_nonneg (by linarith)]; apply (mul_lt_mul_right (by have := h₀.1; nlinarith)).mp
        rw [hx'x]; have : 0 < k := by have := h₀.1; have := h₀.2; nlinarith
        nlinarith
      exact (hmin ⟨x'.toNat, y⟩ hsum (by zify; exact hx'2)).elim
    else
      if hy : y = 0 then rw [hy] at hS; simp at hS; use x; rw [hS, sq]
      else
        have : x' * y + 1 ≤ 0 := by
          have : x' ≤ -1 := by linarith
          have : y ≥ 1 := by zify; exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hy
          nlinarith
        nlinarith
  obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := this; use c; rw [hk, ← hc]; push_cast; field_simp; ring
simp

obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ : ∃ k : ℕ, a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = k * (a * b + 1) := ⟨_, (Nat.mul_div_cancel' h₁).symm⟩
  let S := {p : ℕ × ℕ | 0 < p.1 ∧ 0 < p.2 ∧ p.1 ^ 2 + p.2 ^ 2 = k * (p.1 * p.2 + 1)}
  let p₀ := WellFounded.min (measure (fun p : ℕ × ℕ => p.1 + p.2)).wf S ⟨(a, b), h₀.1, h₀.2, hk.symm⟩
  let A := max p₀.1 p₀.2; let B := min p₀.1 p₀.2
  obtain ⟨hA, hB, hAB_eq⟩ : (A, B) ∈ S := by
    obtain ⟨h1, h2, h3⟩ := WellFounded.min_mem (measure (fun p : ℕ × ℕ => p.1 + p.2)).wf S ⟨(a, b), h₀.1, h₀.2, hk.symm⟩
    cases le_total p₀.1 p₀.2 <;> (simp [A, B, *]; ring_nf; exact h3)
  have h_min : ∀ p ∈ S, A + B ≤ p.1 + p.2 := fun p hp => by rw [A, B, max_add_min]; exact WellFounded.min_le _ _ _ hp
  have h_sq : ∃ x : ℕ, k = x ^ 2 := by
    by_contra h_sq; let x₂ : ℤ := k * B - A
    have hx₂_eq : x₂ ^ 2 - (k * B) * x₂ + (B ^ 2 - k) = 0 := by zify at hAB_eq; linarith
    have hx₂_val : (A : ℤ) * x₂ = B ^ 2 - k := by zify at hAB_eq; linarith
    have hx₂_nonneg : 0 ≤ x₂ := by
      by_contra h; have : 0 < k := by nlinarith [h₀.1, h₀.2, hk]
      nlinarith [h, hB, hx₂_eq]
    have hx₂_pos : 0 < x₂ := by
      cases x₂.eq_zero_or_pos hx₂_nonneg with
      | h1 => linarith [h_sq, B]
      | h2 => exact h
    have hx₂_lt_A : x₂ < A := by
      have : 0 < k := by nlinarith [h₀.1, h₀.2, hk]
      rw [← Int.ofNat_lt, hx₂_val]; nlinarith [min_le_max p₀.1 p₀.2]
    exact (h_min (x₂.toNat, B) ⟨by linarith, hB, by zify; rw [Int.toNat_of_nonneg hx₂_nonneg]; linarith⟩).not_lt (by linarith)
  obtain ⟨x, rfl⟩ := h_sq; exact ⟨x, by rw [Nat.cast_pow, Nat.cast_div h₁, ← hk]; ring⟩
